description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: The expansion_v9 frame contains 1,500 unique groups at SHA-256 1d11079141b1c4e45bbea85f2630c2f16074efce808492bb616af817ca478818. Two isolated receipt-bound reviews achieved 81.07% agreement and Cohen's kappa 0.664. Accountable reviewer edithatogo approved proposal SHA-256 dd45a5f8a94d6e050e67c4ee88226104a4e599e8dcd016822e0e9ab7f3830ef5 on 2026-07-23. The immutable adjudications are SHA-256 6c30943a871b72cd2ddce637e840d6a1a2a8a6a0fda89658da95414c1495d545. A development-only threshold of 0.2 achieved 0.895 balanced accuracy; the sealed 150-case holdout achieved 1.0 sensitivity, 0.7733 specificity, 0.8152 precision, 1.0 NPV and 0.8867 balanced accuracy. Evaluation SHA-256: d37f4d3ca93f60ac628dfb1ed290887fa06a540298cbf5af157561b5ac80696b.

Reviewed RxNorm CPC, CMS ASP/PFS/HCPCS Level II, HPO and complete 7,084-record openFDA bundles plus ignored local restricted CPT evidence produce the separately frozen 1,500-case expansion_v9 frame with no structural family gap. Restricted descriptors remain local and untracked.
The current checksum-bound ledger validates 199 approved decisions. CMS/MBS/PBS/HCPCS restrictions remain explicit; Apache-2.0 applies only to project code and metadata.

Accountable reviewer edithatogo approved commit 345576a6f34f3a5ff1d29dd7bca95ebd3abb9f91 within the tested scope. Hosted run 30004589594 passed 64 tests with exact 11-route by 4-project coverage, 44 attributable screenshots, source-fingerprint parity, structured provenance assertions and prohibited-content checks. Automated packet SHA-256: 8bd309e36319971ad2439eefdba6f3a7d175021cd4ef6dc4f2b3ae59aa951523; owner packet SHA-256: acac3971909baaa8a85cb3da638b5957cb1d0902edeae39d9f203bcad9af5405. Independent manual VoiceOver testing was not performed; this is not a universal accessibility-conformance claim.
